ops.text: {"config":{"cell":"prereg","cid":"Replaying v001 on its own recorded windows must reproduce the ledger sentinel probs within 0.001 BEFORE any 002 scoring. A proposal whose recorded turn_index does not resolve to its recorded anchor_uuid is buffer_relative (partial live buffer) and its window is not faithfully reconstructable; the CID fails unless every proposal reproduces within tolerance. On failure: halt 002 scoring, emit the per-proposal diff table, and diagnose (render drift / adapter version / tokenizer / window reconstruction).","decision_rule":"For every day of shadow proposals in ~/.cc-steer/shadow.db, re-render the daemon's exact live_window at (session_id, anchor_uuid, turn_index) and score both arms on the identical window: v001 (recorded) paired with 002 (E8 winner, render v2, threshold 0.1533). Ledger is idempotent per proposal (upsert on proposal_id).","e002":{"adapter":"/Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-lab/adapters/watcher-lora-e8-winner","base_model":"mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit","render_version":2,"threshold":0.1533203125},"tolerance":0.001,"v001":{"adapter":"/Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/models/watcher/v001-20260710-d161ca2c9ac1","render_version":1,"threshold":0.2373046875}},"config_hash":"a0e60b8ad1d1","dataset_digest":"30d40130d3f8e226","experiment":"E13-dual-shadow","metrics":{"n_proposals":17,"tolerance":0.001},"seed":1729,"verdict":"E13 prereg: For every day of shadow proposals in ~/.cc-steer/shadow.db, re-render the daemon's exact live_window at (session_id, anchor_uuid, turn_index) and score both arms on the identical window: v001 (recorded) paired with 002 (E8 winner, render v2, threshold 0.1533). Ledger is idempotent per proposal (upsert on proposal_id). CID: Replaying v001 on its own recorded windows must reproduce the ledger sentinel probs within 0.001 BEFORE any 002 scoring. A proposal whose recorded turn_index does not resolve to its recorded anchor_uuid is buffer_relative (partial live buffer) and its window is not faithfully reconstructable; the CID fails unless every proposal reproduces within tolerance. On failure: halt 002 scoring, emit the per-proposal diff table, and diagnose (render drift / adapter version / tokenizer / window reconstruction). n=17 proposals; digest 30d40130d3f8e226; seed 1729."}
